name: n8n-workflow-builder
description: The complete n8n workflow toolkit. 7 commands, 5 agents, 1,396 nodes. Build workflows from plain English. Automated Claude-in-the-Middle runtime: background daemon spawns fresh claude subprocesses for every Wait node, fully hands-off, with parallel dispatch and singleton lock. Layered prompts loader for project + plugin library. Interactive UI with AskUserQuestion. Guided setup writes .mcp.json and .env automatically. Credential management via REST API. Testing, docs, audit, components, stateful patterns.
